title: Star Wars: Episode I The Phantom Menace (junior novelization)
content:
{{Top|rwm|imp|title=''Star Wars'': Episode I ''The Phantom Menace''}} {{Otheruses|Star Wars: Episode I The Phantom Menace}} {{Book |image=[[File:Ep1_junior.jpg]] |title=''Star Wars'': Episode I
''The Phantom Menace'' |author=[[Patricia C. Wrede]] |cover artist=*[[Paul Colin]] {{C|Photo montage}} *[[Madalina Stefan]] {{C|Book design}} |illustrator= |editor= |publisher=[[Scholastic]] |early release= |release date=[[May]] [[1999]]{{CollectorCite|6|The Padawan Reading List}} |intl release= |rereleased= |media type=*Paperback *eBook{{Disney|subdomain=books|url=book/star-wars-episode-i-the-phantom-menace-volume-1|text=Star Wars Episode I: The Phantom Menace (Volume 1)}} |pages=192 |isbn=9780590010894 |isbn2= |isbn3= |timeline=[[32 BBY/Legends|32 BBY]]''[[The Essential Reader's Companion]]'' |series=[[Star Wars: Episode I The Phantom Menace|''Star Wars'': Episode I ''The Phantom Menace'']] |preceded by= |followed by=[[Star Wars: Episode II Attack of the Clones (junior novelization)|''Star Wars'': Episode II ''Attack of the Clones'' junior novelization]] }} '''''Star Wars'': Episode I ''The Phantom Menace''''' is a [[Star Wars Legends|Legends]] junior novel written by [[Patricia C. Wrede]], based on a screenplay and story by [[George Lucas]]. It adapts the film [[Star Wars: Episode I The Phantom Menace|''Star Wars'': Episode I ''The Phantom Menace'']], and it was first published in [[May]] 1999 by [[Scholastic]],. The novel was collected in ''[[Star Wars: Collector's Edition]]'' ([[2005]]), ''[[Star Wars Boxed Set: Episodes I–VI]]'' ([[2007]]), and ''[[Star Wars: Prequel Trilogy]]'' ([[2014]]). ==Publisher's summary== ''A long time ago in a galaxy far, far away…'' ''A world is threatened. A young queen must save her people. A dark evil rises again. A young Jedi is discovered.'' ''The journey begins.'' ==Plot summary== {{Plot-link|Star Wars: Episode I The Phantom Menace}} ==Media== {{Mediacat|from=1|imagecat=Images from Star Wars: Episode I The Phantom Menace (junior novelization)}} ===Editions=== *{{ISBN|9780590010894}}; [[May]] [[1999]]; [[Scholastic]]; US paperback *{{ISBN|9780439087063}}; May 1999; Scholastic Inc.; US paperback, Deluxe Edition
